SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
InMemoryMessageBus
In-memory message bus for inter-application communication.
Message
Message for inter-application communication via the message bus.
Message.Builder
Builder for constructing Message instances.
MessageBus
Publish/subscribe message bus for inter-application communication.
MessageHandler
Functional interface for handling messages received from the message bus.
ServiceRegistry
Service registry for inter-application service discovery.
ServiceRegistryImpl
Service registry for inter-application service discovery.
Subscription
Represents an active subscription to a message bus topic.
